gaps: No binding processor obligation to process personal data only on Customer's documented instructions; Vendor has default discretion and objection right only

No specified technical and organizational security measures (e.g., encryption, access controls, logging, vulnerability management, incident response) – only commercially suitable safeguards at Vendor's discretion
Breach notification timing not tied to discovery and does not mandate notice without undue delay within 48 hours; notice only within 10 business days after internal confirmation and executive review
No obligation to return or delete personal data at Customer's direction nor to provide written certification of deletion; only removal on Vendor's ordinary operations schedule
